Stats.ColumnDef.label: owned by colony
Stats.ColumnDef.title: Own
Stats.ColumnDef.description: Whether the colony currently possesses at least one instance of this item.

Stats.ColumnDef.label: appears on map
Stats.ColumnDef.title: Map
Stats.ColumnDef.description: Whether at least one instance of this item is currently spawned and not forbidden on a player home map.
